summary: Iteration 50: Support Tickets, Narrative Progress, and Media Features Testing - All features verified working. Backend APIs (support tickets CRUD, reply, status, narrative progress, brand media analytics) all pass. Frontend UI (Admin Support Tickets tab, floating Support Widget, Guardian Music & Media tab) all verified functional.

ui_bugs.issue: The 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps the floating support widget button, blocking normal click interactions. Requires JavaScript click() to interact.
ui_bugs.note: This is a deployment artifact as mentioned in the test request. The widget works correctly when clicked programmatically.

issues: Messaging form fields use app dark theme (dark background, light text) instead of the explicit bg-white text-gray-900 styles. Text is still readable but doesn't match the intended design. CSS specificity issue.

critical_code_review_comments: All new support ticket features are working correctly - create, list, reply, status update APIs all functional
Admin Support Tickets tab displays tickets properly with expand/collapse, admin replies shown in green boxes, reply input, and status action buttons
Support Widget renders correctly with all form fields (subject, message, type) and attachment buttons (Screenshot, Audio, File)
Guardian Portal Music & Media tab shows Media Controls with per-student ON/OFF toggles
Narrative progress save/get endpoints working correctly
Brand media analytics endpoint returns expected structure
seed_data_creation: Created test support ticket 'TEST_Iteration50_Ticket' for testing. Previous test ticket 'Test Bug Report' with REPLIED status was already in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 tested: 1) Support tickets system - POST /api/support/tickets, GET /api/support/tickets, POST /api/support/tickets/{id}/reply, PUT /api/support/tickets/{id}/status all working. Admin Support Tickets tab has expand/collapse, reply input, status buttons. 2) Floating SupportWidget on authenticated pages has subject/message/type fields plus Screenshot/Audio/File attachment buttons. 3) Narrative progress - POST /api/narratives/save-progress and GET /api/narratives/{id}/progress working. 4) Brand media analytics - GET /api/brands/{id}/media-analytics returns stats. 5) Guardian Portal has Music & Media tab with Media Controls showing per-student ON/OFF toggles. Note: Emergent badge overlaps support widget - use JS click to interact.

support_tickets_api.details: All endpoints working: create ticket (POST), list tickets (GET), admin reply (POST), update status (PUT). Tested with TEST_Iteration50_Ticket.

admin_support_tickets_tab.details: Support Tickets tab visible in admin portal (20 tabs total). Shows ticket list with status badges (IN_PROGRESS, REPLIED, BUG). Expand shows message, admin replies (green box), reply input, and RESOLVED/CLOSED status buttons.

support_widget.details: Floating gold circle button at bottom-right on authenticated pages. Opens panel with Contact Support form - type dropdown, subject input, message textarea, Screenshot/Audio/File buttons, Send to Admin button, History link.

narrative_progress_api.details: POST /api/narratives/save-progress saves current_chapter and scroll_position. GET /api/narratives/{id}/progress returns current_chapter, chapters_completed, scroll_position, status.

brand_media_analytics_api.details: GET /api/brands/{id}/media-analytics returns brand_name, total_media, total_streams, total_likes, total_downloads, and media array.

guardian_music_media_tab.details: Music & Media tab visible in Guardian Portal tab bar. Shows Media Controls section with list of all children, each with ON/OFF toggle for digital media.
